name: Do
description: '''Dominique Rijpma van Hulst''' ({{IPA|nl|doːmiˈnik ˈrɛipmaː vɑn ˈɦʏlst}}; born 7 September 1981) is a Dutch singer known by her stage name '''Do''' ({{IPAc-en|d|oʊ}} {{respell|DOH}}). She is best known for singing vocals in the song "[[Heaven (Bryan Adams song)|Heaven]]", featuring [[DJ Sammy]] and DJ [[Yanou]], a late-2001 cover of the 1985 [[Heaven (Bryan Adams song)|song of the same name]] by [[Bryan Adams]].
